content.en:
The meeting of these abyss monsters of the Royal Beast Sect quickly ended, and they left one by one, heading to the area they were guarding.

They have been arranging the formation, but it is a pity that the time for them to wake up is too short, and it is impossible for the large array that spreads throughout the Imperial Beast Abyss to be arranged so quickly.

This is still because of the foundation of the formation that the Dao Ancestors of the Royal Beast Sect had arranged before, otherwise no matter how many of these half-step True Ancestor-level abyss monsters there were, they would not be able to successfully arrange the large array.

In addition, there are many monsters in the abyss who pose a huge threat to them, the abyss monsters of the Imperial Beast Sect, after all, the people of their Imperial Beast Sect have only transformed into abyss monsters, which does not mean that they can command other abyss monsters.

Abyssal monsters follow the hierarchy, for example, the Abyss nobles can command a large number of Abyss Monsters, but the premise is that they need to be recognized by the will of the Abyss and become the Abyss Lord of an area before they can command other Abyssal Monsters in the territory.

However, they have not yet become Abyss Lords, they are just Abyss Monsters, so naturally they have no way to command other Abyss Monsters.

Although the Imperial Beast Abyss is only a fragment of the Infinite Abyss, there are still lords in the core area, but these abyss lords almost never leave their territory, as long as they don't provoke them, it's not a big problem.

But once they are provoked, they will be doomed to these abyssal monsters.

......

"A wise abyss monster, very strong?"

Ye Tian learned the news from the other half-step True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Palace, and he was also quite surprised.

Because according to his understanding, as well as his understanding of the Infinite Abyss from Black Wind Mountain, it was almost impossible for the Abyss Monster to have intelligence, unless it was an abyss nobleman like the Abyss Lord who had a certain amount of wisdom.

But if the abyss monster wants to become the abyss lord, it is many times more difficult than the true monarch to become the true ancestor, and it is possible for countless abyss monsters to give birth to an abyss nobleman.

Moreover, once the abyss monster becomes the lord of the abyss, it still needs to go through the assessment of the will of the abyss, once the assessment is completed, the soul transforms, and wisdom is born, but once it fails, it will definitely die.

Thus, the abyssal nobility is very rare.

Judging from the news, it was not the Abyss Lord who appeared, but the Abyss Monster.

"Strange, how can an abyss monster have intelligence, this almost breaks the rules of the abyss!" Ye Tian wondered.

The abyssal monsters are very strong and strong, and from the perspective of bloodline and physique, many abyssal monsters are enough to compete with the weaker half-step true ancestors just by relying on their physical bodies.

And once the abyss monster has wisdom and understands the way of cultivation, its strength will inevitably become extremely terrifying.

And such an abyss monster will have a very high chance of being promoted to the abyss lord.

If there are too many abyssal monsters with wisdom like this, then the abyss demons will not only dominate the domain realm, but at least become a huge force that cannot be underestimated in the domain realm, and even break out of the infinite abyss and descend to the outside world!

But in fact, although the Infinite Abyss is a forbidden land, it is just a rule, otherwise a mere Infinite Abyss is not strong at all, and any Upper Triple Heaven Force can send a Supreme Dao Ancestor to enter it and sweep it through.

The so-called forbidden land is only for the lower triple heaven forces and the middle triple heaven forces.

"It seems that the Infinite Abyss has changed, and there are even wisdom abyss monsters born, and I'm afraid there is more than one, the strength of such abyss monsters is too terrifying, and in the Infinite Abyss Fragments, although they are also restricted by the rules, they have the hope of being promoted to the rank of True Ancestors, and even the rules of the Quasi-Dao Realm are difficult to affect the rules in the Infinite Abyss Fragments. Here, it is almost a realm of its own, as long as you don't leave here, the strength of the Abyss Lord will be suppressed at most, and you will not be crushed to death by the rules!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He estimated his strength, and if he really encountered the Abyss Lord, he probably wouldn't be able to beat it.

The Abyss Lord is known as the top bloodline in the Divine Heaven Realm, and only the top geniuses among cultivators can hope to compete with the Abyss Lord at the same level.

And the top genius of the Divine Heaven Realm, what kind of concept is that!

Similar to the Dao ancestor lineage of Longhai Zhenjun, he may not be the top genius in the Divine Heaven Realm.

Ye Tian thought that his strength was perverted, but he did not have much hope of challenging the Abyss Lord by leaping the level.

Unless he goes to the extreme on the path of a half-step True Ancestor, he can only hope to defeat an Abyss Lord.

"Be careful!"

Ye Tian knew that his previous understanding of the Infinite Abyss and common sense were probably useless, there were great changes here, and it was no longer the previous Infinite Abyss.

And, at the moment, there is another problem.

The Infinite Abyss has intelligent creatures, will it also collect the treasures of the Convergence Dao?

Under normal circumstances, the Merge Treasure that is helpful to the cultivator is of little use to the Abyss Lord, and the Abyss Lord will not take the initiative to collect these Merge Path Treasures.

But those intelligent creatures can also build palaces, and their wisdom is also very high, almost like cultivators, maybe they will really collect the treasures of the Harmony Dao.

If that's the case, maybe most of the Infinite Abyss's Merge Dao treasures are on these Wisdom Abyss monsters, and even if there are some that exist all over the Infinite Abyss, there must not be many.

this day.

Ye Tian flew and sensed a water palace in an abyssal river.

In this water palace, Ye Tian's copying talent detected an abyss monster.

He was amazed by what the replicable talent had detected!

Abyss Monster: Li Cang

Cultivation Talent: Advanced

Source Force Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God (Extreme)

Demon Talent: Super God (Extreme)

Source Gun Talent: No superior

Source Water Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

......

Judging from the talent situation, the talent of this abyssal monster is very good, but this is not normal!

The strength of other abyssal monsters depends on bloodline and physique, not talent!

But this abyssal monster has the same talent as a genius cultivator, and it also has a cultivator-like name, which is too strange!

Along the way, many of the abyssal monsters he explored had almost no names, and a name meant too much.

"This abyss monster is not only a sapient creature, but apart from its identity, it is no different from a cultivator, it is a ......."

Ye Tian thought of a possibility, that is, this abyss monster was actually a cultivator, but the cultivator occupied the body of the abyss monster.

Under normal circumstances, there is almost no way to do this, but there are all kinds of weird secret techniques in the Divine Heaven Realm, maybe there are really secret techniques that forcibly occupy the body of the abyss monster and have no sequelae, so you can continue to cultivate!

"Catch him, maybe you will know the situation!"

Ye Tian flew down and quickly approached the Water Palace.

At this time.

The disciples of the Royal Beast Sect who were arranging the formation in the Water Palace sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and immediately frowned.

"Another half-step True Ancestor is here, these people are really looking for death!"

The disciples of the Royal Beast Sect put down the work in their hands and rushed out.

He didn't want to put the battle in his own Water Palace, not to mention the big damage to the Water Palace, it would also destroy his formation prohibition.

"Die!"

The disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect stretched out his abyssal claws and grabbed Ye Tian.

If it was an ordinary half-step True Ancestor, he would be able to kill the other party with one catch.

However, he far underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the Yin and Yang Pole Knife Origin Divine Power, and condensed a sword ray that instantly cut through the abyssal claws of the disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, and the Yin and Yang Polar Knife did not decrease, directly smashing half of the body of the disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect.

Then, Ye Tian used the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to suppress the hard-hit disciples of the Royal Beast Sect, and cast a door sealing secret technique on them.

"Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, you are a disciple of Black Wind Mountain, misunderstanding!"

The disciple of the Royal Beast Sect was shocked and hurriedly spoke.

This opening made Ye Tian take aback.

"You, an abyss monster, actually recognize the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique?" Ye Tian asked.

This Imperial Beast Sect disciple immediately realized that he had slipped his mouth, but he couldn't regret it.

"Say, what is your origin?"

Ye Tian questioned in a cold voice, and a hand pressed on the head of this disciple of the Royal Beast Sect, and the power in his hand was circulating, crushing his head at any time and annihilating his soul.

"I ......"

The disciples of the Royal Beast Sect were extremely frightened, and they wanted to say it but didn't dare to say it.

And secretly, he sent a message.

Ye Tian sensed his transmission, and without saying a word, he directly crushed the opponent's head, and a door attack hit the opponent's body to prevent the opponent from healing and recovering.

In the blink of an eye, the vitality of this Royal Beast Sect disciple was completely lost, and he turned into an abyss monster corpse.

Ye Tian also guessed that the other party might not be able to tell the truth, so he prevented the mutation and killed him, which was also a helpless move.

Subsequently, Ye Tian found a small storage space on his body, which contained a large number of treasures.

When Ye Tian browsed the treasures on his body one by one, he roughly knew the identity of the other party.
